elements.original_description: A plain white background with a single glowing lightbulb in the center, symbolizing the start of an idea. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: professional 2D minimalist icon, a single glowing lightbulb in the center on a pure white background, symbolizing the start of an idea, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

elements.original_description: A white background with a cartoon-style speech bubble in the center, filled with bold black letters spelling out 'SHAME'. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
